title: SQL: multi-attribute GROUP BY may ignore sortedness
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255), category INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, category) VALUES (1, 'apple', 2);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, category) VALUES (2, 'banana', 1);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, category) VALUES (3, NULL, 2);
SELECT category, value FROM test_table GROUP BY category, value ORDER BY category, value;
key_bug_features: multi-attribute GROUP BY ignores sorted order
